---
title: "Program of Study"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/site.R")
file <- "pos"
```

```{r main}
nav()
print_byui()
print_h3("Software Engineering (BS)")
print_pos('SE')
print_newline()
print_h3("Computer Engineering Minor")
print_pos('CE')
print_newline()
print_h3("Data Science Minor")
print_pos('DS')
print_newline()
print_h3("Core {.tabset .tabset-fade}")
print_h4("Programming")
print_pos('GP')
print_newline()
print_h4("Math and Science")
print_pos('GMS')
print_newline()
print_h4("General")
print_pos('GE')
print_newline()
print_hs()
print_pos('HS')
divpage()
print_h2("Self Learn")
print_h3("Solo Learn")
pander("Certificates Include: \n\n\n")
print_solo()
print_newline()
print_h3("Simplilearn")
pander("Courses Include: \n\n\n")
print_pos('SL')
footer(file)
```
